plans.name: Starter
plans.desc: Ideal for quick landing pages and high-performance institutional websites that don't require a blog.
plans.note: R$490 setup fee (R$200 upfront + R$290 on delivery). Maintenance & Hosting: R$149/mo. Min. 12-month contract.

features.text: .com.br domain included for the first year

plans.name: Professional
plans.desc: The complete solution for businesses that need a blog, multiple pages and the freedom to edit their own content.
plans.note: R$1,500 setup fee (R$500 upfront + R$1,000 on delivery). 10% discount for full upfront payment. Maintenance: R$299/mo. Min. 12-month contract.

plans.name: Custom
plans.desc: SaaS systems, APIs, AI automations and complex tailor-made solutions.
plans.note: Pricing defined after technical scope analysis.

about.title: Real technology,
about.text1: Ocyan-Tech develops professional websites, web systems and intelligent automations focused on performance, conversion and digital presence. We don't just deliver beautiful pages — we build tools that help businesses grow in the digital environment.
about.text2: We combine technical expertise, strategic vision and modern development to build fast, secure and scalable solutions. Every project is developed with usability, SEO, visual identity and commercial results in mind.
